cover_letter:
18 July 2026

Hiring Team
Acme Corporation
Re: Program Manager

Dear Hiring Team at Acme Corporation,

My background as an Administrator is a direct match for the Program Manager role at Acme Corporation.

I'm a delivery leader at heart, and my current role as Scrum Master for the Agile Kookaburras squad has me owning end-to-end delivery across sprint cadence, PI planning, capacity management, and executive reporting—exactly the kind of hands-on program management you're looking for. I thrive on turning complex, multi-squad initiatives into predictable, high-quality outcomes.

When I joined the Payday Super program, I inherited a mathematically infeasible SIT window—75+ hours of manual evidence against just 64 available hours. I led the recovery by architecting a six-day tiered harness build with a go/no-go gate, then authored the executive change request that re-baselined test capacity from 30 to 90 person-days. On the automation front, I designed and rolled out a COBOL/mainframe test-evidence solution covering 200+ scenarios across all eight squads, slashing evidence effort from ~3 hours to ~15 minutes per scenario. I also convened a cross-discipline war room that delivered a binding automation recommendation in under three hours—because I believe the best delivery leadership brings people together to solve problems fast.

I'm genuinely excited about the opportunity to bring this delivery leadership to Acme Corporation and would love to discuss how I can help your teams deliver with speed and confidence. I'm available for a call at your convenience.

Sincerely,
Administrator
